name: filing_day
description: FILING DAY (q.side_papers, slot 75): the ci_papers_held aggregate — hold two unfiled Company papers, walk into Lucian Scrollkeeper's Sango archive, and file both (route manifest, then Transition Order 7-A) until the held count reads zero. The two held papers are assumed-faked in the preamble: took_route_manifest (Harvest Road survey wagon) and field_1_transition_taken (Firstfurrow site manager onwin); every other papers_tick held-source is cleared so ci_papers_held is deterministically 2 at the start.

steps.comment: -- reset (idempotent re-runs): chain-set tags, reward candies, and every OTHER papers_tick held-source so ci_papers_held starts exactly 0 --
-- prerequisites (assumed-faked earlier-quest latches): two live Company papers in hand --
-- anchor jump: Lucian's desk in the Sango archive (seated persisted body; placement 2626/119/2777) --
her approach_once one-shot may auto-open the intro in a fresh world — close whatever popped, harmless if nothing did
papers_tick has recomputed by now: exactly the two faked papers are held (FILING DAY aggregate threshold)
-- beat 1: file the route manifest (priority 74 — surfaces first) --

expect_screen_text: A corridor manifest. Every smallholding on Harvest Road, graded like produce — and Firstfurrow struck through as completed. They grade the land before they take it. That is not appetite, that is bookkeeping, which is worse.
Hand it here. The archive pays a records fee for live Company paper, and this is the liveliest I have seen.

steps.wait_chat: Lucian copies every grade into her own ledger

steps.comment: -- beat 2: file Transition Order 7-A (priority 73 — next once manifest_paid latches) --

expect_screen_text: Transition Order 7-A. The family previously associated with this parcel has been transitioned to alternative outcomes. There it is again — the passive voice. Nobody ever does anything in these documents. Things merely happen to people, in triplicate.
The order says there was no prior operator. The order is itself paperwork about the prior operator. They never see the joke. Hand it here.

steps.wait_chat: files the order under F for families

steps.comment: -- finale: the held ledger is empty, the filed ledger grew — FILING DAY line retires itself --
